The correct answer is **Wolverine: Adamantium Rage**, which was released on the PlayStation 2 in 2001. While *Spider-Man 2* (2004) and *Silver Surfer* (2008) were also PlayStation 2 titles, *Howard the Duck* (1986) was released much earlier on the NES. *Wolverine: Adamantium Rage* is the most accurate choice among the options.
